\tzpentry{ID5520}{Potential Energy Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5520 introduces Potential Energy Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{u}(\mathbf{x},t) = \sum_{\ell,m,n} q_{\ell m n}(t)\, \mathbf{U}_{\ell m n}(\mathbf{x}). \end{equation}
